senses.definition_en: facts, information, and skills acquired through experience or education

examples.en: She has extensive knowledge of ancient history.
examples.fa: او دانش گسترده‌ای درباره تاریخ باستان دارد.

idioms.phrase: to the best of my knowledge
idioms.example_en: To the best of my knowledge, the meeting hasn't been rescheduled.
idioms.example_fa: تا آنجا که من می‌دانم، جلسه به تعویق نیفتاده است.

notes: Uncountable in almost all uses; avoid the plural form "knowledges".
